title: Power impact of cooling failure
query_text: How has the cooling failure affected overall power consumption in rack-c?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: The cooling failure caused a 40% reduction in CPU frequency on nodes c01–c04, which reduced their per-node power draw proportionally. However, the CRAC unit itself failed, so facility cooling energy for rack-c dropped to zero from the failed unit — but residual thermal load is building. Total rack-c compute power draw is lower than normal due to throttling, but this is a symptom of the emergency, not an efficiency improvement. The rack is at risk of hardware damage if cooling is not restored.
